subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in exploring a potential partnership.

I’d be glad to set up a 30-minute call. The following time windows are currently available:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 (your local time)

Please let me know which date and time within these windows works best for you.

Regarding direct contact information for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I’m not able to share internal contact details. For any senior-level engagement, please use the public information and contact channels available on our company website, and we’ll ensure the right people are involved.

Best regards,
Agent
